Prefixed Input

Source: Figma Input Prefixed (3037:965). Mirror of Suffixed — prefix on the LEFT, plus optional right-side action icon (Search / Dropdown / Close). Two types: Actionable / Non-Actionable. 11 states.

Right-action icons (Input_Right_Action)
Search
Dropdown
Close
Prefix types
TypePreview
Actionable · Text
Non-Actionable
Label
Prefix + Search action
Label
Prefix + Dropdown
Prefix + Close
Label
States (Type = Actionable)
StatePreview
Default
Active (focused)
Selected (CTA pressed)
Disabled
Error
Success
Full field (Input_Preffixed_Base)
